domains.name: Software Engineering

domains.name: Data Engineering
domains.description: Data processing, storage, and pipeline architecture

facts.statement: k-Nearest Neighbors (kNN) is commonly used in RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines for semantic similarity search.
Vector search is essential for modern AI pipelines, enabling semantic similarity matching for embeddings.
Effective prompt engineering is crucial for getting consistent, high-quality outputs from Large Language Models.
BM25 is a widely-used probabilistic retrieval function that ranks documents based on term frequency and inverse document frequency.
Microservices architecture enables independent deployment and scaling of application components.
RESTful APIs are a standard approach for building stateless, scalable web services.
ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) pipelines are fundamental for moving data between systems and preparing it for analysis.

relationships.description: kNN in RAG requires vector search capabilities
BM25 can be used as an alternative or complement to kNN for retrieval
